subcodes.first_line: The Day of separation hath come, and likewise the time of reunion. At times union is made manifest, and at times division appeareth in illusory realities [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یوم طلاق است و همچنین حین تلاق گاهی وصل ظاهر و هنگامی فصل حقایق موهومه
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
